tickets.title: Initialize monorepo structure
tickets.description: Create backend/, frontend/, docker-compose.yml, root README.md. Add .gitignore for Python + Node.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Folder structure matches SPEC.md; Root README explains how to start; Git repo initialized

tickets.title: Setup Django backend with DRF
tickets.description: Django 5 project with DRF, CORS headers, django-environ for config.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: python manage.py runserver starts; /api/health/ returns ok; requirements.txt pinned

tickets.title: Setup Vue 3 + Vite frontend
tickets.description: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Vue Router + Pinia + Axios.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: npm run dev starts on 5173; API proxy configured; Placeholder home page renders

tickets.title: Configure PostgreSQL + Docker Compose
tickets.description: docker-compose.yml with postgres:16, backend, frontend services.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: docker compose up connects Django to Postgres; Migrations run; Data persists in volume

tickets.title: Configure Tailwind with SQLI brand tokens
tickets.description: Install TailwindCSS. Add SQLI colors from BRAND.md to tailwind.config.js.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: CSS variables for all SQLI colors; Sample branded button works; Cream background preview

tickets.title: Setup linting and formatting
tickets.description: Ruff + mypy (backend), ESLint + Prettier (frontend).
tickets.acceptance_criteria: make lint passes; Lint commands documented

tickets.title: Create Makefile and .env.example
tickets.description: Commands: up, down, migrate, seed, test, lint.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: .env.example lists all vars; make up starts full stack; make migrate works

tickets.title: Setup GitHub Actions CI pipeline
tickets.description: CI workflow: lint + test on push/PR.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Workflow in .github/workflows/ci.yml; Runs backend tests and frontend lint

tickets.title: User model with roles
tickets.description: Custom User model with email login. Roles: admin, recruiter, interviewer, hiring_manager.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Custom User model with email login; Role field with 4 roles; Admin can assign roles

tickets.title: JWT authentication
tickets.description: Login, refresh, logout with djangorestframework-simplejwt.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: POST /api/auth/login/ returns tokens; Refresh works; Invalid credentials return 401

tickets.title: RBAC permission classes for DRF
tickets.description: IsRecruiter, IsInterviewer, IsAdmin permission classes.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Permission classes created; Interviewer cannot delete candidates; Recruiter can create jobs

tickets.title: Auth API register profile change password
tickets.description: GET /api/auth/me/, register (admin-only), change password.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: /api/auth/me/ returns user; Register endpoint; Change password endpoint

tickets.title: Vue auth store + Axios JWT interceptor
tickets.description: Pinia store for login/logout/refresh. Axios Bearer token interceptor.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Pinia auth store works; Axios adds Bearer token; Auto-refresh on 401

tickets.title: Login and Register pages SQLI branded
tickets.description: SQLI logo, tagline, cream background, cobalt CTA.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: SQLI logo + tagline; Form validation; Redirect to dashboard on success

tickets.title: Vue Router auth guards
tickets.description: Unauthenticated redirect to /login. Role-based route restrictions.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated users redirected; Role-based route restrictions work

tickets.title: JobOpening model + CRUD API
tickets.description: Full CRUD at /api/jobs/ with title, department, location, level, description, skills, status.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: CRUD at /api/jobs/; Serializer validation; Pagination; API tests

tickets.title: PipelineStage model
tickets.description: Default stages seeded. Stages linked to job or global default. Ordered with colors.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Default 7 stages seeded; Linked to job; Ordered by order field with color

tickets.title: Jobs list and detail Vue pages
tickets.description: Table of jobs with status badges. Job detail with candidate count per stage.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Jobs table with badges; Detail page with stage counts; Empty state

tickets.title: Job create/edit form with skills tags
tickets.description: Form with all fields. Skills as tag input. Create and edit modes.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Full form; Skills tag input; Create/edit modes; Success toast

tickets.title: Candidate model + CRUD API
tickets.description: CRUD at /api/candidates/. Filter by job, stage, search, date. Linked to job + stage.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: CRUD with filters; Linked to job + stage; API tests

tickets.title: Resume file upload
tickets.description: POST upload-resume accepts PDF max 5MB. Stored in media/resumes/.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: PDF upload max 5MB; Stored in media/; Download link on detail

tickets.title: Move candidate between pipeline stages
tickets.description: POST move-stage with stage_id and reason. Creates activity log.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: move-stage endpoint; Activity log created; Reject from any stage

tickets.title: Activity timeline audit log
tickets.description: GET timeline returns chronological events with user and timestamp.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Timeline endpoint; Events: created, stage_change, note, interview, scorecard

tickets.title: Candidate list table view with search/filter
tickets.description: Sortable columns, search bar, filter dropdowns, pagination.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Sortable table; Search + filters; Pagination; Click to detail

tickets.title: Kanban board view drag and drop
tickets.description: Columns = stages. Drag cards triggers move-stage API. Toggle table/kanban.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Kanban columns; Drag and drop; Card shows name/job/days; View toggle

tickets.title: Candidate detail page with timeline
tickets.description: Header, tabs (Overview, Timeline, Interviews, Scorecards, AI Brief), quick actions.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Detail page with tabs; Quick actions; Resume preview

tickets.title: Interview model + CRUD API
tickets.description: CRUD at /api/interviews/. Fields: candidate, job, type, date, duration, location, status.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: CRUD at /api/interviews/; Filter by date, interviewer, status

tickets.title: Assign multiple interviewers to interview
tickets.description: M2M interview-interviewers. Interviewer sees only assigned. Notification on assign.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: M2M works; Interviewer filtered view; Notification created

tickets.title: Interview calendar view
tickets.description: Week view with interview blocks. Color-coded by type. Click to detail modal.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Week calendar view; Color-coded blocks; Click opens modal

tickets.title: Schedule interview form/modal
tickets.description: Date/time picker, interviewer multi-select, type phone/video/onsite.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Schedule form/modal; All fields; Creates notification

tickets.title: Scorecard model + submit API
tickets.description: POST scorecards linked to interview. Ratings, recommendation, private notes.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Scorecard API; Unique per interviewer/interview; Private notes RBAC

tickets.title: Scorecard form UI for interviewers
tickets.description: Star ratings, recommendation dropdown, text areas. My Interviews page.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Full scorecard form; My Interviews page; Marks interview complete

tickets.title: Aggregate scorecard view on candidate page
tickets.description: All scorecards summary. Average ratings. Recommendation consensus.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Aggregate view; Average ratings; Consensus shown

tickets.title: AIService abstraction OpenAI + Ollama
tickets.description: AIService base class. OpenAIProvider and OllamaProvider. Rate limiting.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: AIService with 3 methods; Both providers; Rate limit 20/hour; Unit tests

tickets.title: AI Interview Question Generator API + UI
tickets.description: POST generate-questions. Vue panel with generate/copy/save/regenerate.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: API returns 8-12 questions; Vue panel works; Loading spinner; Regenerate

tickets.title: AI Feedback Summarizer API + UI
tickets.description: POST summarize-feedback. AI Hiring Brief card on candidate detail.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Summary API; Brief card on detail; AI disclaimer shown

tickets.title: AI Mock Interview chat API + UI
tickets.description: Chat UI. AI asks questions, gives feedback. Session saved. End session summary.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Chat UI works; Multi-turn conversation; Session saved; End summary

tickets.title: AI session history and logging
tickets.description: GET /api/ai/sessions/. Filter by type. View mock transcripts.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Session list endpoint; Filter by type; View transcripts

tickets.title: App shell layout sidebar + topbar
tickets.description: SQLI branded sidebar nav, collapsible, topbar with notifications.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Sidebar + topbar; Collapsible; Midnight blue + cream; Responsive

tickets.title: Dashboard with funnel chart and stats
tickets.description: Pipeline funnel, stat cards, activity feed, AI usage widget.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Funnel chart; Stat cards; Activity feed; AI stats

tickets.title: In-app notification system
tickets.description: Bell icon with badge. Dropdown list. Auto-create on key events.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Notification API; Bell with badge; Auto-create on events

tickets.title: Settings and user profile page
tickets.description: Edit profile, change password. Admin user management.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Profile edit; Password change; Admin user table

tickets.title: Seed command with demo data
tickets.description: make seed creates users, jobs, candidates, interviews, scorecards.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Seed command; 3 jobs 15 candidates; Prints login credentials

tickets.title: Backend test suite 70% coverage
tickets.description: Tests for auth, jobs, candidates, interviews, scorecards, AI mocked.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: 70%+ coverage; Permission tests; make test passes; CI passes

tickets.title: Frontend manual test checklist
tickets.description: TESTING.md with step-by-step cases covering demo script.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: TESTING.md created; All demo steps covered; All pass

tickets.title: Docker production build + nginx
tickets.description: Multi-stage Dockerfiles. Nginx serves Vue, proxies /api.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Production Docker build; Nginx config; docker compose up works fresh

tickets.title: Project README and API documentation
tickets.description: README with mermaid diagram. Swagger UI at /api/docs/.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: README complete; Swagger UI; Architecture diagram

tickets.title: Final demo and acceptance review
tickets.description: 5-min screen recording of demo script. All tickets done. No critical bugs.
tickets.acceptance_criteria: Demo recorded; All tickets done; No critical bugs
